title: Groq TTS Support
summary: Yes — Groq supports TTS via Canopy Labs' Orpheus model on GroqCloud, with an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
body:
Yes. Groq offers TTS via GroqCloud using Canopy Labs' Orpheus model (launched Jan 2026).

Endpoint: https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/speech
Drop-in OpenAI-compatible — just swap base URL and model name.

Models:
- canopylabs/orpheus-v1-english — expressive, vocal direction controls. Voices: troy, hannah, austin (others available). ~$22/1M chars.
- canopylabs/orpheus-arabic-saudi — Saudi dialect. ~$40/1M chars.

Output: WAV default, 48kHz. Ultra-low latency (~100 chars/sec throughput).

Docs: https://console.groq.com/docs/text-to-speech
